summary: A Fox News BREAKING NEWS segment with aerial footage of a Los Angeles immigration operation, and Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons interviewed in a box. He speaks about a vehicle ramming and about assaults on officers. The segment is a cable-news clip with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; BREAKING NEWS: U.S. MARSHAL AND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SHOT DURING LOS ANGELES IMMIGRATION OPERATION; Todd Lyons, Acting I.C.E. Director
